name: Credit Counseling & Affordable Debt Consolidation - Austin Texas
description_short: Texas-based debt consolidation and settlement company serving Austin residents. Combines multiple debts into one payment with fees claimed to be 40% lower than national competitors.
description_long:
Affordable Debt Consolidation is a Texas-focused debt relief provider operating primarily in the Austin area. The company positions itself as a local alternative to national debt relief firms, emphasizing regional expertise and personalized service for Texas residents.

The company offers debt consolidation and debt settlement programs designed to combine multiple unsecured debts—including credit cards, medical bills, and payday loans—into single monthly payments. They claim clients can reduce payments by up to 50% and complete programs in 12 to 48 months. The company markets programs tailored to various demographics, including seniors, high-income earners, and truck drivers.

Affordable Debt Consolidation differentiates itself primarily on geography and cost. They emphasize being Texas-based with Certified Texas Debt Specialists serving only local clients, and claim fees approximately 40% lower than national competitors. The website notes they are a "trusted voice in the industry" cited by local Texas news outlets and mention having accredited programs.

However, critical details are absent from the website. There is no transparent fee structure, no explanation of how debt relief settlements work, no disclosure of credit score impact, and no specific program success rates or client outcomes. The company does not clarify whether they offer debt settlement (negotiating reduced payoffs) or debt consolidation loans. The phrase "accredited debt relief programs" is mentioned but not defined. Without independent verification of the 40% savings claim or fee comparison, and absent any third-party ratings or certifications listed, consumers should request detailed written disclosures before enrollment.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Texas-based company claiming 40% lower fees than national debt relief competitors
Offers free debt consolidation review with no stated obligation
Claims to complete programs in 12-48 months, faster than some alternatives
Serves multiple demographic groups including seniors and high-income earners
Marketing emphasizes personalized, tailored debt relief strategies rather than one-size-fits-all
Claims potential to reduce monthly payments by up to 50%
Local expertise for Austin and Texas residents
cons: Website provides no transparent fee structure or cost breakdown—only vague claims of being cheaper
Does not clarify core service offering: is this debt settlement, consolidation loans, or management?
No disclosure of credit score impact or negative reporting to creditors
No independent third-party ratings, certifications, or Better Business Bureau accreditation visible
No specific client success rates, testimonials, or documented outcomes provided
best_for: Austin and Texas residents with multiple unsecured debts seeking local, personalized service
Consumers wanting to consolidate credit cards, medical bills, and payday loans into one payment
Texas residents suspicious of national debt relief firms and preferring regional expertise
diagnosis: Best for Texas residents overwhelmed by multiple unsecured debts who prefer working with a local, Texas-focused firm rather than national providers. Critical caveat: The website lacks transparent fee disclosure, explicit explanation of service type (settlement vs. consolidation), and independent verification of claimed savings or success rates—request detailed written disclosures and compare terms with other debt relief providers before committing.
services: Debt consolidation planning and program enrollment
Debt relief programs for high-income earners
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
